verses.text: David will praise God 'with my whole heart' and worship toward His temple, magnifying His word above His name, for 'in the day when I cried thou answeredst me.' Answered prayer fuels his praise. The God who hears strengthens the soul that calls.

David will praise God 'with my whole heart' and worship toward His temple, magnifying His word above His name, for 'in the day when I cried thou answeredst me.' Answered prayer fuels his praise. The God who hears strengthens the soul that calls.

David will praise God 'with my whole heart' and worship toward His temple, magnifying His word above His name, for 'in the day when I cried thou answeredst me.' Answered prayer fuels his praise. The God who hears strengthens the soul that calls.

All the kings of the earth shall praise the LORD when they hear His words, and sing of His ways and glory. His truth will win the nations. The word of God is destined to draw even rulers to His praise.

All the kings of the earth shall praise the LORD when they hear His words, and sing of His ways and glory. His truth will win the nations. The word of God is destined to draw even rulers to His praise.

Though high, the LORD 'hath respect unto the lowly,' reviving David amid trouble; 'the LORD will perfect that which concerneth me.' His mercy endures for ever. The exalted God stoops to the humble and finishes the good work He begins.
